game.title: Potioneer
game.short_text: Potioneer is a game were you craft Potions based on a customer`s order.

details.title: Potioneer
details.description:
Potioneer is a game were you craft Potions based on a customer`s order.
This is a small game made for the "My First GameJam 2022" in the time span of 2 weeks. The theme for this jam was healing (in this game you make and sell healing-potions).
Attention, this is not the final game. I just want to see what you guys think about the game.
--------------------------------------
Tutorial:
You can press E to interact!
Interact with the counter to see the customer`s request!
1. Fill the caudron with water by interacting with it.
2. Get an ingredient from the boxes for the base potion and throw it into the cauldron.
3. Now pick other ingredients to give the potion new properties (order does not matter).
4. Interact withe the cauldron and sell the potion you made at the counter.
 Interact to get all ingredient effects.
 Interact to clear your hand/inventory.

--------------------------------------
Credits:
Music: evilduckk.itch.io/sound-assets-for-your-adventure-game
SFX: jdwasabi.itch.io/8-bit-16-bit-sound-effects-pack
Font: mounirtohami.itch.io/minimalpixel-font
GUI: https: mounirtohami.itch.io/pixel-art-gui-elements
Food(sprites): henrysoftware.itch.io/pixel-food
Enviroment(sprites): gif-superretroworld.itch.io/interior-pack

game.title: Knight Watch
game.short_text: Keep prisoners locked away till their judgement.

details.title: Knight Watch
details.description:
Knight Watch
In this game you are a brutal prison guard who will do whatever it takes to keep the prisoners in their cells till tomorrow so they can be judged, and for some executed.
About The Project
The team loved making the game over the GAMJAM.
We used Unreal Engine 5, Wwise and Perforce to create this game. Advice for anyone doing indie: do not use Wwise or Perforce. They will cause you endless trouble.
Wwise makes adding audio more complicated for everyone & your audio guys will still need to learn UE5.
Perforce is not user friendly. You will have project files missing & need to manually find files to be uploaded . If your team is remote and spread around the world in different time zones (like ours), anyone who is not in the same country as the server will experience slow downloads.
Game Controls:
WASD - MovementLeft ALT - Toggle free camera to look aroundLeft Click Mouse - Attack Prisoners
The game was made by the following people: codercommand - Team Leader & ProgrammerDikkus - Environment ArtistKezzy - Prop ArtistSartop - ProgrammerKlea - Sound EffectsNeema - Game Music ComposerRapture - Voice ActorRamyeon - Concept Artist & Illustrator
Some of our game assets were provided by third parties. Credits:
Player character by SoidevKnight statue by Nick ScottPlayer's mace by Prop Garden LLCSome Props by Infuse StudioUnreal Megascans Medieval Collection used for some props

game.title: Fate Of Kingdom
game.short_text: Save the royal family in a top down, action, roguelike game.

details.title: Fate Of Kingdom
details.description:
Save the royal family in a top down, action, roguelike game.
The throne has fallen. This is your last chance to save royal members. You get your staff, Dress your favored hat and gather all your will and strength to save the ones that lived mercifully when no one else believed you: The royal family.
Challenge the enemies who are responsible for this destruction and end this madness once and for all. Do you think you have what it takes? We'll see.
Controls
Player Movement: WASDAttack: Left Mouse ButtonAim: Mouse

What's New in Update 1.0.3
Added in-game cursorAdded save slots for New GameAdded playing football with skullsFixed same position enemy spawn bugFixed new wave spawn bug after the room cleared.Fixed in-game music pause bug after changing volume in the options menu. 

Team
Producer : Esmaeil

Designers : Unbirthday , Atomic

Programmers : Esmaeil , Vicoodi

Composer and SFX : Marian Walczak

Art : Tensei 

Itch.io Assets provided by  jonik9i , 0x72

game.title: Silent Wings 2491
game.short_text: silent Wings 2491 is a lite scrolling shoot'em up with some roguelike elements & #MyFirstGameJam submission

details.title: Silent Wings 2491
details.description:
#MyFirstGameJam 2022
Silent Wings 2491
'Silent Wings 2491' is my submission for #MyFirstGameJam Summer 2022 and homage to one of my favorite games as a kid - Screaming Wings 1942.
Silent Wings 2491 is a lite scrolling shoot'em up with some roguelike elements. However, you CANNOT shoot in this game! you can only evade your enemies and their bullets. Your objective: look for someone who could help you 'heal' your airplane while surviving the enemies attacks.
How to play

Use the arrows to move your airplaneUse 'z' to make a roll*Use 'x' to dash*
*you are invincible while you are doing a dash or roll 
Watch it played!
Thanks to @browntulstar! he played 'Silent Wing 2491' on his twitch stream.
Credits
Asset Packs:Voxel Ancient Environments; Voxel Planes; and Voxel Pirates & Ships by maxparataSimple FX - Cartoon Particles by Synty Studios
Music and sounds:The background song is called 'The Moon Is a Harsh Mistress' by Kō-ya Takashi / DOVA-Syndrome8-bit Sfxpack by beepyeahchiptone by sfbgames
Fonts: Black Ops One and Spectral fonts from Google Fonts

details.title: B33 - Medic Scavanger
details.description:
B 33  Medic Scavanger
In the far future, medical supplies are rare and so a new job emerged: Medical Scavangers. Captain Lyani and her Bot B33  simply called BEE are one of those. They got a Mission from the Inter Space Clinic to get a left behind Sample in a Research Lab.  Since the Enviroment is harsh only BEE can enter, but Lyani standing by him via many Comlink interactions. 
What did they do in this Lab?  Is BEE save? - Find Out and Play B33 Medic Scavanger to find it out for your self!
--//--//--//--//--//--//--//--//--//--//--//--//--//--//--//--//--//--//--//--//--//--//

This Game was made for the "MyFirstGameJam" 2022 Summer edition.
its my 4. GameJam I ever joined and I challanged my self to make a Full Metroidvania with all the things I learned in the last year.
I used assets from Anzimus Goose Ninja and some CC0 stuff. Many assets where additionaly drawn by me.
The Bossfight took me 12 Hours of Coding refactoring and testing.  I know it doesn t look like that but it was very challanging to get the States running.

--//--//--//--//--//--//--//--//--//--//--//--//--//--//--//--//--//--//--//--//--//--//

Please leave a comment when you Playes and give me some feedback.
I hope you have fun with my new Game. Thetra 00 You like my Games and what I do? Join my Discord https://discord.gg/bfGhqSF85D

details.title: Among Us: Zombie Overflow
details.description:
After all the imposters have been busted, you and your crewmates are on course for Among Us Planet. However, when your spacecraft is about to reach the planet, you hear a faint croaking noise. Suddenly, one of your crewmates reaches and runs for you. You instinctively kick it away and it dies. Could this be another imposter? No, that’s not possible! An alarm starts blaring. A crewmate jumped out of a room, just to be dragged back by something. After that, 2 crewmates, both green, start attempting to grab you. These must be zombies! You quickly break the navigation system in fear of zombies spreading on your planet. But it’s too late. Your ship crashes onto Among Us Planet. Will you survive or will the zombies get the better of everyone.

Controls
WASD - movement
E - Show shop
Mouse - click to shoot and right click to place an item.
Q - Switch Weapons
Scroll - Change selected inventory slot

game.title: It's Not You, It's Your Trauma
game.short_text: a.k.a. "I Was Transported To Another World To Do Mundane Tasks!?"

details.title: It's Not You, It's Your Trauma
details.description:
The world's most prosaic isekai.
---
Stuck in an unfamiliar world inside a library that records the entirety of its history through mysteriously magical means, Sammy Baxa must... dust the shelves?
Well, at least she's got a friend to accompany her while she waits for a way back home.
"It's Not You, It's Your Trauma" is a short character-focused game with lots of dialogue and lots of silly faces and just a little bit of drama.
---
Content Warnings:
Implied Child AbuseImplied Discussion of Suicide
---
MISC:
Made for "My First Game Jam: Summer 2022"!Credits + Controls can be found as a .txt file included in the downloadSocials + Other Projects: https://linktr.ee/concord.and.cliches
---
Thank you so much for checking out "It's Not You, It's Your Trauma"!

game.title: GB/X
game.short_text: Old school dungeon crawling for the Game Boy Color

details.title: GB/X
details.description:
This is a proof-of-concept for a dungeon crawling game, made in GB Studio.
THIS IS A PROTOTYPE. The following features are not fully implemented:
EquipmentThe merchantThe cleric and wizard classes (you can choose them, but their spells do nothing)Music and sound effects
You can play the game in browser or download the .gb file to play on a Game Boy Color emulator, such as Sameboy. If you have the appropriate hardware, it's also possible to flash the ROM to a cartridge and play on your actual Game Boy Color or Game Boy Advance.
Browser Controls
D-pad: WASD
Start: Enter
Select: Right Shift (unused)
A: J
B: K
About
The mechanics are a simplified version of the 1981 Tom Moldvay edition of the Dungeons & Dragons Basic Rulebook, with some additional material inspired by the David "Zeb" Cook edition of the D&D Expert Rulebook, the Rules Cyclopedia edition of D&D from 1991, and the 5e edition of D&D  from 2014.
Made for My First Game Jam: Summer 2022.
You can find the source code here: https://gitlab.com/errantcandian/gbx
Credits
This game includes assets and code from the following sources, with some modifications:
https://chrismaltby.itch.io/gb-studiohttps://sondanielson.itch.io/gameboy-simple-rpg-tilesethttps://petricakegames.itch.io/retro-green-dungeon-tilesethttps://monkeyimage.itch.io/world-tilesets-remasteredhttps://gumpyfunction.itch.io/game-boy-rpg-fantasy-tileset-freehttps://gamekrazzy.itch.io/gameboy-zelda-like-dungeon-assetshttps://niamov.itch.io/16x16-gb-tilesethttps://elthen.itch.io/2d-pixel-art-goblin-worker-spriteshttps://limezu.itch.io/weaponspriteshttps://route1rodent.itch.io/16x16-rpg-character-sprite-sheethttps://opengameart.org/content/nes-style-rpg-charactershttps://opengameart.org/content/more-nes-style-rpg-charactershttps://github.com/crawl/tilesYou can play the game in-browser from the game's web page.
If you download the .gb file, you will need a Game Boy emulator to run it on a computer. I've tested it successfully with Sameboy.
If you have the right equipment, you can also flash the .gb file to a cartridge and play the game on an actual Game Boy Color or Game Boy Advance! Follow the instructions that came with your third-party cartridge. I've done this successfully with an EZ-FLASH Junior and a SanDisk MicroSD card. I've received reports that it works on several third-party handhelds as well.

game.title: Doodled Doctor
game.short_text: Warioware - but doodly and about doctors

details.title: Doodled Doctor
details.description:
Rush through several minigames, help patients, and out-do yourself.


Doodled Doctor is a game that was created during the My First Game Jam Summer 2022 event, which had an optional theme around healing. The game is centered around rushing through minigames in a warioware-like fashion and getting higher and higher scores.

This is my first real project and was done (mostly) solo, I hope you enjoy.Though this game mostly uses the mouse, it will sometimes give signs that you need to use the keyboard for a specific minigame.

game.title: Mimi's Apothecary
game.short_text: Create healing tonics in this cozy IF/SIM game.

details.title: Mimi's Apothecary
details.description:
CW: mention of family loss
Play as Sirona, a local apothecary attending to customers alone for the first time since her mimi's passing...and on their busiest day of the year. Mimi's Apothecary is a cozy and comforting interactive fiction game that was developed in 14 days for My First Game Jam.

Development Team:
veeb - Programmer, Narrative Designer, Writer
crunchygoose - Artist
lashman - Composer

Contains the following assets:
Voice Blip
Door SFX
Rummaging SFX
Crash SFX

Disclaimer: This game is for entertainment purposes only, the information in this game should not be used for treating health problems or disease.If your computer states that it can't open the file, click cancel and then try right clicking on the file and choosing "open." You should now have the option to open the game.
